titleStmt.title: SII 22.277: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 277. (A.R. No. 277 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVANAVĪRADĒVA (KULŌTTUṄGA III)—34th YEAR (A.D. 1211-12).

summary.p: This records the royal order issued at the request of Śēdirāyaṉ, granting 96 vēli of land tax-free at Vadiyūr for the requirements of worship of god Uttama-Chōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār consecrated by the chief in the temple of Tirumārpēṟuḍaiyār. The signatories to this order are 8 officers of the king including the Tirumandiravōlai (Secretary) Rājanārāyaṇa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉnāka tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti kone riṉmai ko
ṇṭāṉ tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu nāḷ 3 100 4 10- nāl jayaṅ koṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattut tirumāṟperuṭaiyār koyil tevakaṉmikkum śrīmāhe
śvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum cetirāyaṉ Ikko
yilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uttamacoḷiśvaramuṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷuk
ku Iṟuppatāka vatiyūr nilam toṇṇūṟṟu veliyum muppattunālāvatu pacāṉamutal
Ittevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇu meṉṟu Ivaṉ namakkuc coṉ
ṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varik
kuk kūṟuceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Innilam muppattunālāvatu pacāṉa mutal Ittevarkkut te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nimantañ celuttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai Irā
janārāyaṇamuventaveḷāṉ Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻi ñattarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
(ivai) cittirājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaāṇātirā
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muventarayaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
